# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    options {
        timestamps()
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
    }

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'Direct HTTP/S URL to the build artifact (e.g. S3 presigned URL, Artifactory URL, generic HTTP server URL)')
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM', defaultValue: '', description: 'Optional SHA256 checksum to verify downloaded artifact')
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_FILENAME', defaultValue: '', description: 'Optional filename to save the artifact as on the Jenkins agent')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_SERVERS', defaultValue: 'prod-1.example.com,prod-2.example.com', description: 'Comma-separated list of production servers')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_USER', defaultValue: 'deploy', description: 'SSH user for deployment')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_DIR', defaultValue: '/opt/myapp/releases', description: 'Remote deployment directory')
        string(name: 'ACTIVE_LINK', defaultValue: '/opt/myapp/current', description: 'Symlink path to active release')
        booleanParam(name: 'RESTART_SERVICE', defaultValue: true, description: 'Restart service after deployment')
        string(name: 'SERVICE_NAME', defaultValue: 'myapp', description: 'Service name to restart')
        string(name: 'EXTRA_DEPLOY_ARGS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Extra args passed to the deployment script/command')
    }

    environment {
        WORK_DIR = "${env.WORKSPACE}/artifact_deploy"
        ARTIFACT_PATH = "${env.WORKSPACE}/artifact_deploy/downloaded_artifact"
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URL?.trim()) {
                        error('ARTIFACT_URL is required')
                    }

                    def allowed = ['http://', 'https://']
                    if (!allowed.any { params.ARTIFACT_URL.toLowerCase().startsWith(it) }) {
                        error('ARTIFACT_URL must start with http:// or https://')
                    }

                    if (!params.DEPLOY_SERVERS?.trim()) {
                        error('DEPLOY_SERVERS is required')
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Prepare Workspace') {
            steps {
                sh '''
                    set -euo pipefail
                    rm -rf "${WORK_DIR}"
                    mkdir -p "${WORK_DIR}"
                '''
            }
        }

        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactFile = params.ARTIFACT_FILENAME?.trim()
                    if (!artifactFile) {
                        artifactFile = params.ARTIFACT_URL.tokenize('/').last()
                        if (!artifactFile) {
                            artifactFile = 'artifact.bin'
                        }
                    }

                    env.ARTIFACT_PATH = "${env.WORKSPACE}/artifact_deploy/${artifactFile}"

                    sh """
                        set -euo pipefail
                        curl -fL --retry 3 --retry-delay 2 -o '${env.ARTIFACT_PATH}' '${params.ARTIFACT_URL}'
                        ls -lh '${env.ARTIFACT_PATH}'
                    """

                    if (params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM?.trim()) {
                        sh """
                            set -euo pipefail
                            echo '${params.ARTIFACT_CHECKSUM}  ${env.ARTIFACT_PATH}' | sha256sum -c -
                        """
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = params.DEPLOY_SERVERS.split(',').collect { it.trim() }.findAll { it }
                    if (!servers) {
                        error('No valid deployment servers provided')
                    }

                    def artifactBase = new File(env.ARTIFACT_PATH).name
                    def extraArgs = params.EXTRA_DEPLOY_ARGS?.trim()
                    if (!extraArgs) {
                        extraArgs = ''
                    }

                    servers.each { server ->
                        sh """
                            set -euo pipefail

                            ssh -o BatchMode=yes '${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server}' 'mkdir -p "${params.DEPLOY_DIR}"'

                            scp -o BatchMode=yes '${env.ARTIFACT_PATH}' '${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server}:${params.DEPLOY_DIR}/${artifactBase}'

                            ssh -o BatchMode=yes '${params.DEPLOY_USER}@${server}' '
                                set -euo pipefail
                                cd "${params.DEPLOY_DIR}"
                                RELEASE_FILE="${artifactBase}"
                                RELEASE_DIR="${params.DEPLOY_DIR}/$(basename "${artifactBase}" .tar.gz)-$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)"

                                mkdir -p "${RELEASE_DIR}"

                                case "${RELEASE_FILE}" in
                                  *.tar.gz|*.tgz)
                                    tar -xzf "${RELEASE_FILE}" -C "${RELEASE_DIR}"
                                    ;;
                                  *.tar)
                                    tar -xf "${RELEASE_FILE}" -C "${RELEASE_DIR}"
                                    ;;
                                  *.zip)
                                    unzip -o "${RELEASE_FILE}" -d "${RELEASE_DIR}"
                                    ;;
                                  *)
                                    cp -f "${RELEASE_FILE}" "${RELEASE_DIR}/"
                                    ;;
                                esac

                                ln -sfn "${RELEASE_DIR}" "${params.ACTIVE_LINK}"

                                if [ "${RESTART_SERVICE}" = "true" ]; then
                                  if command -v systemctl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                                    systemctl restart "${params.SERVICE_NAME}"
                                  else
                                    service "${params.SERVICE_NAME}" restart
                                  fi
                                fi

                                ${extraArgs}
                            '
                        """
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            cleanWs(deleteDirs: true, notFailBuild: true)
        }
    }
}
